name: Simple Notes Application
description: Build a complete notes application with CRUD operations, search functionality, and persistent storage
prompt:
Create a simple notes application in Go with the following features:

1. RESTful API with endpoints for:
   - GET /notes - List all notes
   - GET /notes/:id - Get a specific note
   - POST /notes - Create a new note
   - PUT /notes/:id - Update a note
   - DELETE /notes/:id - Delete a note
   - GET /notes/search?q=query - Search notes

2. Data Model:
   - Note should have: ID (UUID), Title, Content, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, Tags
   - Use PostgreSQL for persistence
   - Include proper database migrations

3. Requirements:
   - Use Gin web framework
   - Implement proper error handling
   - Add input validation
   - Include comprehensive unit tests
   - Add integration tests
   - Provide a Dockerfile
   - Include docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL
   - Add README with setup and usage instructions
   - Implement logging using a structured logger
   - Add proper CORS handling

4. Code Quality:
   - Follow Go best practices
   - Use proper package structure
   - Add comments for public functions
   - Handle edge cases
   - No TODO or placeholder comments
   - All functions should be fully implemented

5. Testing:
   - Unit tests for all handlers
   - Integration tests for API endpoints
   - Database tests with test fixtures
   - Minimum 80% code coverage

The application should be production-ready and follow best practices for Go web development.
